# Navneet Singh Arora
Machine Learning & Full Stack Engineer | n8n Creator

Expertise in AI, Machine Learning, and Full Stack Development with over 6 years of industry experience.

## Technical Expertise
- **AI Engineering**: HuggingFace, PyTorch, LangChain, Google Vertex AI, Gemini, Ollama.
- **Backend & APIs**: Python, FastAPI, Hasura, PostgreSQL, Docker, GCP.
- **Automation**: n8n (Recognized n8n Creator), GitHub Actions, Bash scripting.

## Career Summary
Navneet is a professional with deep specialization in creating intelligent automation and scalable backend architectures.

## Recent Work
- **IndoRE**: Relation Extraction for Low Resource Indian Languages. Uses mBERT and RoBERTa for NLP in Bengali, Telugu, and Hindi.
- **COLMAN**: Collaborative Multi-Agent Navigation using Textual-Visual Embeddings. Leverages Transformers and CLIP for embodied AI.

## Site Structure
